description_long: This object is a modern foldable mobile phone with a sleek, rectangular form factor and a glossy finish. The front features a large, uninterrupted display with minimal bezels, showcasing a dynamic, abstract wallpaper in shades of purple and white. The back is divided into two main panels, with the upper section housing a dual camera setup and a small secondary display, both positioned in the top left corner. The phone's exterior is primarily a vibrant blue color, accented by black and metallic elements along the edges. The sides are thin and feature subtle button placements, maintaining a streamlined profile. The overall design suggests a premium device, likely constructed from glass and metal, with attention to both aesthetics and functionality.
description: A sleek, foldable mobile phone with a large front display, blue back panels, and a dual camera setup. The design is modern, glossy, and premium, with minimal bezels and a compact form factor.
description_view_0: Front view showing a large, edge-to-edge display with a purple abstract wallpaper and no visible buttons or cameras.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the phone's slimness and the placement of physical buttons along the edge.
description_view_2: Back view displaying two blue panels, a dual camera module, a small secondary screen, and a flash in the top left corner.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again highlighting the thinness and button placement, mirroring the other edge.
attribute_screen_display_content: The main screen displays an abstract, purple and white wallpaper with no visible icons, widgets, or notifications.
attribute_camera_placement: Two camera lenses are located in the top left corner of the back panel, arranged vertically with a flash below them. There is also a small secondary display adjacent to the cameras.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons are visible along the right and left edges, likely serving as power and volume controls. The buttons are slim and flush with the frame.
